title: Image 1 of Evening star (Washington, D.C.), September 2, 1963
raw_ocr: Weather Forecast District and vicinitylncreasing cloudiness tonight low near 63 Considerable cloudi ness tomorrow with a chance of showers not much change in temperature High to day 75 at 11 am low 57 at 610 am Full Report on Page 14 111th Year No 245 5 in Roving Band Charged in Killing On Kalorama Road Victim Was Chosen at Random For Robbery Youths Tell Police By DONALD HIRZEL Star Staff Writer Five young men armed and cruising the streets in a stolen car apparently selected Newell W Ellison jr at utter random to be the victim of the robbery attempt that resulted in his death police said today The five two of whom are Juveniles have been charged with homicide in the fatal shooting of the 27yearold college teacher a week ago yesterday in the 2300 block of Kalorama road NW According to the account given by Inspector Richard J Felber and Deputy Police Chief John B Layton the five were aimlessly driving around in the fashionable Kalorama Viet Nam Asks MonksReturn 3 Given Refuge In U S Embassy SAIGON Viet Nam Sept 2 AP Saigons military gov ernor demanded custody today of three Buddhist monks granted refuge in the
